transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks for calling Riverside Health Navigation, this is Ava. How can I help you today?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Hi, I need a refill on my blood pressure medication. It's lisinopril, ten milligrams.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Sure, I can help with that. Can I get your name and date of birth to pull up your file?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks, Sandra. I see your lisinopril prescription from Dr. Newell, last filled at Cedar Pharmacy on Maple Street. Is that still your preferred pharmacy?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Great, and you have two refills remaining, so I can send this one through right now. It should be ready within a couple hours.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: You're welcome. I've submitted the refill request to Cedar Pharmacy. You'll get a text when it's ready for pickup.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Anytime, Sandra. Take care, and have a good rest of your day.
